message: fix: trim robot env + deterministic stats batching

files.patch:
@@ -40,6 +40,8 @@ fn index_then_tui_once_headless() {
         .arg("--full")
         .arg("--data-dir")
         .arg(&data_dir)
+        // Avoid connector detection from the repository CWD (e.g. `.aider.chat.history.md`).
+        .current_dir(&home)
         .assert()
         .success();
 
@@ -49,6 +51,8 @@ fn index_then_tui_once_headless() {
         .arg("--data-dir")
         .arg(&data_dir)
         .arg("--once")
+        // Avoid connector detection from the repository CWD (e.g. `.aider.chat.history.md`).
+        .current_dir(&home)
         .env("TUI_HEADLESS", "1")
         .assert()
         .success();

@@ -91,6 +91,8 @@ fn index_full_creates_artifacts() {
     cargo_bin_cmd!("cass")
         .args(["index", "--full", "--data-dir"])
         .arg(&data_dir)
+        // Avoid connector detection from the repository CWD (e.g. `.aider.chat.history.md`).
+        .current_dir(home)
         .env("CODEX_HOME", &codex_home)
         .env("HOME", home)
         .assert()

@@ -146,6 +150,8 @@ fn incremental_reindex_preserves_and_appends_messages() {
